construct_verdict_reason: All items measure the presence of durable goods and domestic appliances in the household, directly operationalizing the construct of household asset endowment as a socioeconomic status proxy.

items.reason: Radio/radio recorder is a durable domestic appliance consistent with household asset endowment measurement.
Television is a standard durable good included in asset endowment scales.
Blender (licuadora) is a domestic appliance measuring household asset stock.
Washing machine is a core durable appliance in household asset endowment measurement.
Refrigerator is a fundamental durable appliance and standard asset endowment indicator.
Mobile phone is a modern durable good appropriately included in contemporary asset endowment scales.
Vehicle ownership is a durable asset directly measuring household socioeconomic status.
Computer is a modern durable good consistent with household asset endowment measurement.
Gas water heater/boiler is a durable household appliance measuring asset endowment.
Heating system is a durable household asset appropriately included in endowment measurement.
Solar panels are a modern durable asset reflecting household socioeconomic status and living standards.
Air conditioning is a durable household appliance consistent with asset endowment measurement.
